active_projects.description: Persist core context index entries across extension reloads by creating core-index-entries.json and modifying the loader to always include it
Add domain/subdomain/summary metadata to 11 extension source index-entries.json files so metadata persists across loader reloads
Fix 13 malformed @-references in 2 extension rule source files (nix.md, web-astro.md) that use wrong path prefixes
active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed 13 malformed @-references in 2 extension rule source files: nix.md (8 refs) and web-astro.md (5 refs). Replaced extensions/{ext}/context/ prefix with context/ to point to installed paths instead of source directories.

active_projects.description: Verify and fix pitch-deck duplicate entries in filetypes extension source index-entries.json
active_projects.completion_summary: Verified no-op: filetypes extension source index-entries.json contains 7 entries with zero pitch-deck references. The orphaned pitch-deck entries in the output index.json were added by external processes, not sourced from filetypes. Covered by task 302.

active_projects.description: Fix extension loader to clean orphaned index.json entries when doing sparse extension reloads
active_projects.completion_summary: Added remove_index_entries_by_prefix() to merge.lua and integrated it into the unload flow in init.lua. After tracked entry removal, the loader now scans remaining entries and removes any whose path matches the unloaded extension's provides.context prefixes. Uses trailing-slash normalization for safe prefix matching.

active_projects.description: Remove 2 orphaned index.json entries from Website .claude/context/ that reference non-existent pitch-deck files
active_projects.completion_summary: Removed 2 orphaned pitch-deck entries from Website index.json (256 -> 254 entries). The 24 lean4 orphans from the original research were already gone. Zero orphans remain.

active_projects.description: Add index.json entries for 75 context files that exist on disk but aren't indexed in Website .claude/context/
active_projects.completion_summary: Added 75 new index.json entries for unindexed .md files under .claude/context/. All entries use domain='core', subdomain derived from directory name, summary=null, empty keywords/topics/load_when. Total entries: 329 (was 254). Zero unindexed files remain.

active_projects.description: Remove 2 duplicate pitch-deck index entries referencing non-existent files in filetypes subdomain
active_projects.completion_summary: Removed 2 duplicate pitch-deck index entries from filetypes/patterns/ that duplicated existing present/patterns/ entries with richer metadata.

active_projects.description: Add missing summary fields to 67 index.json entries in Website .claude/context/
active_projects.completion_summary: Added summaries to 69 project/ entries in index.json (67 original + 2 added by task 299). All summaries follow noun-phrase style, 27-112 chars, no trailing period. Zero null summaries remain in project/ entries.

active_projects.description: Add missing domain/subdomain metadata to 134 index.json entries in Website .claude/context/
active_projects.completion_summary: Added domain='project' and subdomain (derived from second path component) to all 134 entries that were missing these fields. lean4 paths use subdomain 'lean' per existing convention. Verified 0 null domain/subdomain remaining.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of Neovim and WezTerm configurations showing no automatic directory-changing behavior
Research report documenting OAuth2 token expiration as root cause and fix procedure
3-phase implementation plan for fixing Gmail OAuth2 authentication
